sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n25881" key="dia/spastos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">διά-σπαστος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n25881.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">incoherent, disconnected,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἐπιστολαί</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0640.tlg001:2:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alciphr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.2</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
